## LibraryData.IMergeLibrarySource interface

Specifies a library to merge with optional collection filtering.

Used when creating a new library that should include collections from an existing library instance. The filter parameter allows selective merging of collections.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IMergeLibrarySource<TLibrary, TCollectionId extends string = string> 
```

</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Controls which collections to merge from this library.

- `true` (default): Merge all collections. - `false`<!-- -->: Merge no collections (skip this library). - `TCollectionId[]`<!-- -->: Merge only the specified collections by name. - `ILibraryLoadParams`<!-- -->: Fine-grained control using include/exclude patterns.
